channel.title: Ric 05 on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Ric 05 on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: Ric on TV
item.description: A few day ago I downloaded an episode of Tatort , a German TV series. The Episode <strong>&ldquo;Tatort: Borowski und eine Frage von reinem Geschmack&rdquo;</strong> - link in German only - aired on 24 October 2010. The story doesn’t really matter for this post, but have a look at the screenshot below, they have a Ric print hanging at the office. Screenshot of Borowski und eine Frage von reinem Geschmack
